/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/densenet121-HE.dir/main_densenet121.cpp.o  -o ../bin/densenet121-HE ../lib/libSCI-HE.a ../lib/libSCI-LinearHE.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so ../build/lib/libseal-4.1.a -pthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so -lpthread
